workload_isolation.rch_note: Criterion benches and samply runs are CPU/IO-bound on the local host; `rch exec -- cargo bench` would marshal artifacts over the network and contaminate timings. Build offload (cargo build) is fine via rch; bench execution is local.

tuning_applied.governor: (amd_pstate; per-cpu governor not exposed under /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu0/cpufreq on this kernel — no change applied)
tuning_applied.no_turbo: (intel_pstate not present on AMD; no change applied)
